title: Cross Crosslet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Cross Crosslet''' was a [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel SpecForces]] decoration awarded for outstanding valor that went well beyond the call of duty. As such, it was awarded posthumously 45% of the time. The Cross Crosslet was a [[Gold/Legends|gold]] cross on a [[Platinum/Legends|platinum]] background.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-XX-XX -->''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]''
